creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2009-11-13 09:32:39 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-p2p/verlihub     Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    net-p2p/verlihub/files patch-thublink pkg-message.in 
  Removed files:
    net-p2p/verlihub/files patch-CVE-2008-5706 patch-db_charset 
                           patch-plugins 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.9.8e-r1
  - Database charset is utf8 by default now - according to new version
  changes. Message to user after install added.
  - Fix GeoIP prefix handling.
  - This version uses gcc 4.2+
  - Some clean up
  - Mantainer e-mail change
  
  PR:             ports/137220
  Submitted by:   Mikle Davidkin <me@skylord.ru> (maintainer)
